name: NHS England National Secure Data Environment
description: The national-level Secure Data Environment operated by NHS England, providing secure access to linked national health datasets for approved research. Part of the wider SDE network of 12 environments (11 regional + 1 national).

requirements.name: DARS application
requirements.description: Submit a Data Access Request Service application via the NHS England portal

requirements.name: IGAP approval
requirements.description: Application reviewed by the Independent Group Advising on the Release of Data

requirements.name: Data sharing agreement
requirements.description: Formal data sharing agreement between NHS England and the requesting organisation

access_steps.name: Register on DARS portal
access_steps.description: Create an account on the NHS England Data Access Request Service portal

access_steps.name: Submit DARS application
access_steps.description: Complete and submit the data access application with study protocol, data minimisation justification, and legal basis

access_steps.name: IGAP review
access_steps.description: Independent review panel assesses the application for governance compliance

access_steps.name: Data sharing agreement
access_steps.description: Negotiate and sign the formal data sharing agreement

access_steps.name: SDE provisioning
access_steps.description: TRE workspace set up and data provisioned for the approved project

timeline.notes: Preparing DARS application, gathering supporting documents
SDE workspace setup and data provisioning

costs.notes: No fees for approved research since 2024 policy change. Previously fee-based.

strengths: Largest linked health dataset in England
Breadth of national datasets (HES, primary care, mortality, cancer, mental health)
Part of expanding SDE network with improving infrastructure
limitations: Long review times (IGAP can take several months)
England only - no devolved nation data
No data extraction - analysis must run within SDE
SDE platform still maturing - user experience varies
recent_changes: SDE network fully operational with 12 environments (2025)
Data (Use and Access) Act 2025 mandates new information standards
Free access policy for approved researchers (2024)
